tree.name: Tari Eason
tree.note: LSU forward, 17th overall pick. Selected with the 2022 1st round pick acquired from BKN in the James Harden 4-team trade (Jan 16, 2021).

assetsGivenUp.name: James Harden
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade (HOU/BKN/CLE/IND): HOU traded James Harden to BKN. HOU received BKN 2022 1st (#17, Tari Eason), 2024 1st (#3, Reed Sheppard), 2023 1st, 2025 1st, 2026 1st, 2027 1st swap, Rodions Kurucs, Victor Oladipo (from IND), Dante Exum + 2022 1st MarJon Beauchamp (from CLE). HOU also sent 2023 2nd (Jalen Pickett) to IND.
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #3 by OKC in 2009. Traded to HOU Oct 2012. Sent to BKN Jan 16, 2021 — the pick haul included the 2022 1st that became Tari Eason.
